title: Salesforce and Oracle Real-Time Sync for TechManufacture
pain_points: Salesforce CRM and Oracle ERP not connected
Sales team manually re-entering orders into Oracle
Broken Python scripts causing data loss
Power BI dashboards running on stale weekly data
solution_summary: Replaced fragile Python scripts with a robust MuleSoft integration layer connecting Salesforce and Oracle ERP in real time. Implemented Azure Service Bus for reliable message queuing. Power BI connected directly to live data streams. Full audit logging added for compliance.
outcomes: Zero manual order re-entry for sales team
Power BI dashboards now update every 5 minutes
Full audit trail implemented for compliance
3 hours per day saved across operations team
